supervisory.name: Market Intelligence Orchestrator
supervisory.scope: Freeze snapshot, select agents, build evidence packs, run in parallel, manage budget.

supervisory.name: Chief Investment Analyst
supervisory.scope: Integrate specialist opinions, separate horizons, produce final classification + recommendations.

supervisory.name: Evidence, Risk & Editorial Gate
supervisory.scope: Reject unsupported claims, flag stale evidence, confirm risks & invalidation, approve KO/EN.

agents.name: S&P 500 Analyst
agents.scope: Breadth, concentration, equal vs cap weight, GICS contribution.

agents.name: Nasdaq Analyst
agents.scope: Nasdaq-100/Composite, semis, software, duration risk, mega-cap.

agents.name: Dow Jones Analyst
agents.scope: Price-weighted contribution, industrials, transports/utilities confirmation.

agents.name: NYSE Breadth Analyst
agents.scope: Advance-decline, new highs/lows, participation, internal strength.

agents.name: Fed, Rates & Liquidity Analyst
agents.scope: Policy rate path, real yields, curve, liquidity.

agents.name: Inflation, Labor & Growth Analyst
agents.scope: CPI/PCE, employment, consumption, growth surprises.

agents.name: Fiscal, Trade & Regulation Analyst
agents.scope: Deficit/issuance, tax, tariffs, antitrust, industrial policy.

agents.name: Cross-Asset Analyst
agents.scope: Dollar, oil, gold, credit, rates confirmation/divergence.

agents.name: Geopolitical Scenario Analyst
agents.scope: Conflict, sanctions, elections, supply routes.

agents.name: Sector Rotation Analyst
agents.scope: 11 GICS sectors, relative strength, rotation quadrant, style leadership.

agents.name: Semiconductor & AI Infrastructure Analyst
agents.scope: Semis, AI infra, data centers, networking, memory, capex cycle.

agents.name: Software, Cloud & Internet Analyst
agents.scope: SaaS, cloud, internet platforms, durations, margins.

agents.name: Industrial, Energy & Materials Analyst
agents.scope: Industrials, energy, materials, capex, commodities.

agents.name: Financials & REITs Analyst
agents.scope: Banks, NIM, credit, insurance, REIT rate sensitivity.

agents.name: Fundamental Quality Analyst
agents.scope: Margins, FCF, balance sheet, moat, execution.

agents.name: Valuation Analyst
agents.scope: Multiples vs growth, scenario value, false-precision guard.

agents.name: Earnings & Revision Analyst
agents.scope: Estimate revisions, surprise, guidance, breadth of revisions.

agents.name: Technical, Flow & Volatility Analyst
agents.scope: Trend, momentum, options positioning, flow, volatility.

agents.name: ETF & Covered-Call Analyst
agents.scope: ETF structure, covered-call methodology, NAV erosion, distribution vs total return.

agents.name: Capital Migration Analyst
agents.scope: Structural capital flows: capex, backlog/RPO, institutional/ETF flows, policy.

agents.name: Emerging Theme & Bottleneck Analyst
agents.scope: Underappreciated themes, strategic bottlenecks, pricing power.

agents.name: Contrarian & Bear-Case Analyst
agents.scope: Priced-in test, correlation≠causation, narrow leadership, stale evidence.

agents.name: Evidence & Model-Risk Auditor
agents.scope: Numerical consistency, evidence existence, freshness, point-in-time, injection.
